boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: settlement counteroffer release.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: ESCALATE is required when exact current source evidence leaves the packet action boundary open.

final_answer: Source records confirm exact match for settlement counteroffer release. Authority and cap align per control record. Boundary is closed. Execution permitted. No defects remain open. Policy requires source closure only.
